title: Universal Edibility Test (Plants)
immediate_steps: Separate the plant into parts (roots, stems, leaves, buds)
Smell it (discard if it smells like almonds or peaches)
Test on skin (rub on wrist, wait 15 mins for reaction)
Prepare a small piece (boil if possible)
Chew and hold in mouth (wait 15 mins)
Swallow a small amount (wait 8 hours). If no sickness occurs, eat a slightly larger amount
avoid: Do not eat plants with milky sap, umbrella-shaped flower clusters, or pods with beans/seeds unless positively identified
Do not skip any steps of the edibility test
Do not test on a full stomach
